evals.prompt: I need to brainstorm features for a B2B expense management SaaS product targeting mid-market companies. We want to differentiate from Expensify and Concur. Generate ideas across multiple creative directions.
evals.expected_output: A structured brainstorm with diverse feature ideas across multiple directions, with divergent and convergent phases
expectations: Output uses a structured brainstorming process (not just a flat list)
Output generates ideas across at least 3 different strategic directions or angles
Output includes both obvious and non-obvious ideas
Output references the competitive context (Expensify, Concur) in the framing
Output converges on top candidates with brief rationale

evals.prompt: Brainstorm names and positioning concepts for a new AI-powered legal contract review tool targeting in-house legal teams at mid-size companies. We need name ideas, taglines, and brand positioning directions.
evals.expected_output: A creative brainstorm of name options, taglines, and positioning concepts with evaluation criteria
expectations: Output generates at least 8-10 name options
Output includes tagline options for key name candidates
Output proposes at least 3 distinct positioning directions
Output evaluates names against criteria (memorability, domain availability, legal clarity, etc.)
Output identifies a recommended direction for further exploration

evals.prompt: I'm building a new employee onboarding experience for a fully remote tech company. Brainstorm ways to make the first 90 days exceptional — covering both digital tools and human touchpoints.
evals.expected_output: A divergent brainstorm of onboarding experience ideas spanning digital and human dimensions, converging on a shortlist of highest-impact concepts
expectations: Output covers both digital/tool ideas and human/social ideas
Output structures ideas by time period (Day 1, Week 1, Month 1, etc.) or theme
Output includes at least one unconventional or unexpected idea
Output identifies the top 3-5 highest-impact ideas
Output considers remote-specific challenges and opportunities
